title: This NotebookLM feature cuts my workload by 50%
summary: NotebookLM's Mind Maps feature generates a visual map of all topics and subtopics in uploaded source material, allowing users to selectively explore relevant sections without reading all content. This reduces the effort needed to identify and extract useful information from multiple sources.
